description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma sandals are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These sandals are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperSynthetic uppers with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle with adjustable velcro closures Padded straps on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug FitLogo embroidered on the ankle and the fore-foot strapMidsoleCushioned suede foot-bed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional lugs on the fore-foot and heel for superior gripBranding on the mid-foot Outsole reinforced to the upperSandal careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
